name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap expands hover actuator-disk loads into per-rotor source-term targets.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC powered hover source-term requests.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies per-rotor center axis force and moment source geometry.
note: Source geometry used by the powered hover map.

name: l2_actuator_disk_calibration
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration supplies hover spin pressure jump induced velocity edgewise advance and Reynolds context.
note: Load and inflow context used by the powered hover map.

name: l2_powered_hover_experiment_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverExperimentPlan consumes this source-map target in the future powered-hover source harness.
note: Downstream plan using this source-map target.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered hover source terms.
